question: What headline text appears on the blue lower-third graphic during the broadcast? A. FOX 13 NEWS B. JENNIFER HOLTON C. MAN ENDS LIFE AFTER DOG'S DEATH D. @JENNHOLTONFOX

What color is the sleeveless top worn by the blonde news anchor? A. White B. Grey C. Olive green D. Black
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man holds a large silver fish up to the camera. Two female anchors are positioned in a split-screen layout, one wearing white and the other in olive green. The woman in the olive green top speaks directly to the camera from a newsroom setting. A blue banner at the bottom displays the headline 'MAN ENDS LIFE AFTER DOG'S DEATH'. The FOX 13 logo appears in the corner.
